symptom_vector: packet corruption and data corruption causing network bit errors and corrupted packets

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: frontend 和 recommendationservice 之间的网络通信因网络攻击导致数据包损坏，表现为 pod_network_receive_bytes、pod_network_transmit_bytes 等网络指标异常
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 frontend 服务的 rrt 和 rrt_max 指标出现灾难性增长，从正常 12-14ms 飙升至 3-9秒，增幅达 365-740倍
Step 2: 分析 frontend 与 recommendationservice 之间的调用链，发现 RecommendationService/ListRecommendations 操作的平均耗时从正常 120-140ms 暴增至 55-58秒，延迟增加 440-470倍
Step 3: 日志中发现 frontend 出现大量 'failed to get product recommendations' 错误，包含 'context canceled'、'transport is closing' 和 'i/o timeout' 等网络连接问题
Step 4: 确认网络指标 pod_network_receive_bytes 和 pod_network_transmit_bytes 在故障期间出现异常模式，表明网络层存在数据包损坏问题

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Catastrophic latency increase from ~120-140ms normal to ~55-58s anomaly (440-470x increase)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 调用 recommendationservice 的 RecommendationService/ListRecommendations 操作的延迟是否出现灾难性增长

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains transport errors like 'Error while dialing' and connection timeout messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend 日志中搜索 'Error while dialing'、'i/o timeout' 和 'transport is closing' 等网络连接错误关键词

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains RPC context canceled errors with 'failed to get product recommendations' messages
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 日志中是否出现 'failed to get product recommendations: rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled' 错误模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains timeout errors in network connections
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索 frontend 日志中的 timeout 相关错误，特别是网络连接超时
检查日志中是否出现 'Unavailable' 状态的服务不可用错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request proportion anomalies between checkoutservice and frontend
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 checkoutservice 和 frontend 之间的请求比例异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Error ratio spikes from 0% to 5-15% across frontend instances
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 服务的 error_ratio 指标是否从正常 0% 飙升至异常水平

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Massive response time increase from milliseconds to seconds range
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 frontend 服务的 rrt 和 rrt_max 指标是否出现灾难性增长（从毫秒级到秒级）

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request and response metrics showing abnormal patterns
critical_checks.instruction: 检查各服务的 request 和 response 指标是否出现异常模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal network traffic patterns indicating packet corruption
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 pod 的网络指标（pod_network_receive_bytes、pod_network_transmit_bytes 等）是否显示异常的数据包传输模式，表明网络数据包损坏
